$comment: DB-2 schema descriptor for yengo-content.db — backend-only SQLite content store. Source of truth: backend/puzzle_manager/core/content_db.py (_SCHEMA_SQL). Last Updated: 2026-03-14
title: yengo-content.db (DB-2) Schema
description: Backend-only SQLite content store. Holds full SGF text, canonical position hashes for deduplication, and board setup data. Never shipped to browser. Used by the publish stage for incremental builds and dedup detection.

tables.name: sgf_files
tables.description: One row per ingested puzzle. Stores full SGF content and extracted position data for deduplication. The canonical position_hash allows detecting puzzles with identical board setups regardless of source filename or SGF metadata differences.

columns.name: content_hash
columns.description: 16-char lowercase hex. SHA-256(sgf_content)[:16]. Matches GN property, SGF filename, and DB-1 puzzles.content_hash.

columns.name: sgf_content
columns.description: Full canonical SGF text as written to yengo-puzzle-collections/sgf/{batch}/{content_hash}.sgf.

columns.name: position_hash
columns.description: 16-char hex derived from canonical board setup: SHA-256('SZ{n}:B[sorted_ab]:W[sorted_aw]:PL[B|W]')[:16]. NULL if extraction failed. Used for duplicate detection across sources.

columns.name: board_size
columns.description: SGF SZ property value. Almost always 19.

columns.name: black_stones
columns.description: JSON array of AB stone coordinates in SGF lowercase notation (e.g. '["pd","qd"]'). Sorted for determinism.

columns.name: white_stones
columns.description: JSON array of AW stone coordinates in SGF lowercase notation. Sorted for determinism.

columns.name: first_player
columns.description: SGF PL property: 'B' (Black moves first) or 'W' (White moves first).

columns.name: stone_count
columns.description: Total stones on board (len(black_stones) + len(white_stones)). Used with board_size for fast dedup pre-filtering.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Source adapter identifier (e.g. 'sanderland', 'ogs'). Populated from --source CLI flag at publish time.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this entry was inserted.

columns.name: batch
columns.description: 4-digit zero-padded batch directory (e.g. '0001'). Used for path reconstruction and rollback.

indexes.name: idx_sgf_position
indexes.description: Fast lookup of duplicate board positions.

indexes.name: idx_sgf_stones
indexes.description: Fast narrowing for dedup check: same size + count before comparing position_hash.

indexes.name: idx_sgf_source
indexes.description: Filter all puzzles from a given source (e.g. for rollback).

dedup_logic.description: Two puzzles are duplicates if position_hash matches. Computed via canonical_position_hash() in content_db.py: sort AB and AW stones independently, join as comma-separated, hash 'SZ{n}:B[ab_sorted]:W[aw_sorted]:PL[player]' with SHA-256[:16].

see_also.description: DB-1 (yengo-search.db) schema — the frontend search index shipped to browser.
Full architecture narrative, incremental publish flow, and rollback/reconcile operations.
Python implementation: schema DDL, canonical_position_hash(), extract_position_data().
